direction: reuse cached QL normal velocity on the row-offset branch
rationale: v42_rowoff still reloads KLAS3 side-normal geometry and recomputes U_pre * COSF + V_pre * SINF to form QZH3, even though CalculateFluxKernel already computed the same owner normal velocity in QL[1] before boundary dispatch. Reusing QL[1] removes redundant geometry loads and multiply-add work while preserving the side-length multiply and existing row-offset reuse.
